755.description: Fix ruff issues in test_scheduler, remove from ruff exclude

778.description: Fix all 153 ruff lint errors in tests/test_observable/.

779.description: Fix pyright errors in tests/test_scheduler/; remove from pyright exclude.

780.description: Fix pyright errors in 16 files in tests/test_observable/ (batch 1).

782.description: Fix pyright errors in 30 files in tests/test_observable/ (batch 2), ~84 errors fixed.

785.description: Fix pyright strict-mode errors in 25 files in tests/test_observable/ (batch 3).

788.description: Add 10 TestScheduler-based tests for exclusive() operator.

TBD-docstrings-2026-05-03.description: Fix docstrings in _groupbyuntil.py (missing element_mapper), _publishvalue.py (add docstring), _tomarbles.py (move docstring to outer fn, fix __all__).

notes: tests/test_subject: merged #762 - removed from pyright exclude.

tests/test_scheduler: PR #779 merged. However, current master STILL has tests/test_scheduler in pyright exclude. Running pyright (full workspace) with test_scheduler included shows ~1112 errors. The 'zero errors' from targeting the directory directly was misleading - workspace mode finds more.
tests/test_observable ruff: PR #778 merged - removed from ruff exclude.

tests/test_observable pyright batches 1-3: PRs #780, #782, #785 merged. However, full workspace pyright (no args) still shows ~6989 errors in test_observable - root cause is untyped test function parameters, unknown return types from TestScheduler types. The open-file mode (pyright tests/test_observable/) shows 0 errors but workspace mode reveals much deeper issues.

pyright exclude cleanup: Both tests/test_scheduler and tests/test_observable still have deep workspace-mode pyright errors. Cannot remove from exclude list without massive annotation effort on all test functions.
exclusive() operator had no tests - created PR #788 on branch repo-assist/test-exclusive-operator-2026-05-02 with 10 TestScheduler-based tests.

Docstring improvements: PR on branch repo-assist/improve-docstrings-2026-05-03 - fixed element_mapper missing from groupbyuntil docstring, added publishvalue_ docstring (only operator without one), moved to_marbles docstring to outer function and added to_marbles to __all__.
Issue labelling: all unlabelled issues blocked by integrity filter. Requires min-integrity: approved in workflow config.
Release PR #776 (reactivex 5.0.0-rc.2) still open - waiting for maintainer merge.
Operators with no test files: delaysubscription, finallyaction, groupbyuntil, startswith, tomarbles, whiledo (exclusive now has tests via #788). Good candidates for future testing runs.
